sentences.arabic: يَتَجَنَّبُ نَادِرٌ الْأَكْلَ كَثِيرًا فِي اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translationEn: Nadir avoids eating too much at night.

sentences.arabic: يَأْكُلُ عَشَاءَهُ قَبْلَ السَّاعَةِ الثَّامِنَةِ مَسَاءً.
sentences.translationEn: He has dinner before eight o'clock in the evening.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لَهُ الطَّبِيبُ إِنَّ ذَلِكَ مُفِيدٌ لِلْهَضْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ljekar mu je rekao da je to korisno za varenje.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor told him that this is good for digestion.

sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ نَادِرٌ بِخِفَّةٍ وَرَاحَةٍ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Nadir se svako jutro osjeća lako i odmorno.
sentences.translationEn: Nadir feels light and rested every morning.
